# Mantle Bridge

> Mantle Bridge moves supported tokens between Ethereum and Mantle Network through canonical contracts — deposits, withdrawals, approvals, and finalization covered here.

## Key facts
- Route: Ethereum mainnet (chain ID 1)  Mantle mainnet (chain ID 5000)
- Deposit: Typically about two minutes per the official FAQ
- Withdraw: Up to ~12 hours, plus an Ethereum claim transaction
- Gas: ETH on Ethereum, MNT on Mantle
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs every transaction
- Verify: Use the official contracts; beware fake bridge sites

## On this page
- [What is Mantle Bridge?](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#what)
- [How bridging works](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#how)
- [Depositing to the destination](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#deposit)
- [Withdrawing back](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#withdraw)
- [Time and fees](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#fees)
- [Is Mantle Bridge safe?](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#safety)
- [Problems and fixes](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#troubleshoot)
- [FAQ](https://mantlebridge.github.io/#faq)

## App
- [Mantle Bridge dashboard](https://mantlebridge.github.io/)
